text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation in this modern, almost clinical space. The orderly and minimalist aesthetic, punctuated by emergency equipment and neutral colors, makes me contemplate the purpose behind these arrangements. Entering the second area, an exhibit on R+D, I am energized by the bold colors and innovative atmosphere. The text on the wall prompts me to consider our evolving relationship with technology and intelligent machines. I feel small but curious, like a witness to humanity striving for progress and understanding in an interconnected world.
